title: Tower T10015 Infinity Rapid Boil Jug Kettle with Boil Dry Protection, Automatic Shut Off, Removable Washable Filter, 3000 W, 1.7 Litre, Brushed Stainless Steel
features: 3KW QUICK BOIL: Boil the perfect morning brew in less than a minute, ideal when you’re in a bit of a rush
1.7L CAPACITY: The large 1.7L capacity lets you make up to 7 cups of tea or coffee from one fill, perfect when hosting your family and friends
EASY FILL FLIP LID: Designed to prevent messy spills when making your brew, for more convenient all-round easy usage

WATER VIEWING WINDOW: Its external water level viewing window shows when a refill is needed, and you can also control how much water goes into the kettle – using less energy and saving money on your monthly bills
3 YEAR GUARANTEE: Trusted Tower quality with a standard 1-year manufacturer’s guarantee and a 2-year extension, subject to product registration online
description: From the manufacturer Our brand’s strength comes from its heritage – something that can’t be forged and something that allows us to continue offering highly desirable housewares products to a wide customer-base with unshakable brand loyalty. Quality, Innovation and Value Customers' Trusted Brand Healthy Cooking for Decades Desirable Electrical and Housewares Products Boil the perfect morning brew with Tower’s Infinity jug kettle Make the ideal hot drink in no time with the 3KW Jug Kettle from Tower. The large 1.7L capacity lets you make up to 7 cups of tea or coffee from one fill, perfect when hosting your family and friends. The easy fill flip lid is designed to prevent messy spills when making your brew, for more convenient all-round easy usage. An external water level viewing window shows when a refill is needed, and also helps control how much water goes into the kettle. 360° swivel base is perfect for left or right-handed users Easy fill flip open lid for all-round easy usage 1.7L capacity brews up to 7 cups in one fill Removable washable filter for easy cleaning LED indicator light EASY FILL FLIP LID: Designed to prevent messy spills when making your brew, for more convenient all-round easy usage PART OF THE INFINITY COLLECTION Essential cooking appliances with a classic look to suit any style of kitchen, combining quality materials and modern features to make everyday tasks easier 3KW QUICK BOIL Boil the perfect morning brew in less than a minute, ideal when you’re in a bit of a rush
